title: Chain 1/8: Doctor Appointment
scene: 你打电话预约家庭医生。（对话链：打电话）

turns.cn: 阳光诊所，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Sunny Clinic. How may I help you?

turns.cn: 我想预约体检，下周有空吗？
turns.en: I'd like to schedule a checkup. Any openings next week?

turns.cn: 周三上午十点或周五下午两点。
turns.en: Wednesday at ten AM or Friday at two PM.

turns.cn: 周三十点，姓张。
turns.en: Wednesday at ten. Last name Zhang.

turns.cn: 记下了，提前十五分钟到，带保险卡。
turns.en: Got it. Arrive fifteen minutes early with your insurance card.

turns.cn: 好的，谢谢。
turns.en: Okay. Thank you.

title: Chain 2/8: Bank Inquiry
scene: 你打电话问银行房贷利率。（对话链：打电话）

turns.cn: 感谢您致电，请问需要什么服务？
turns.en: Thank you for calling. How can I assist you?

turns.cn: 想咨询三十固定房贷利率。
turns.en: I'd like to ask about thirty-year fixed mortgage rates.

turns.cn: 目前六点二五起，看信用分和首付。
turns.en: Starting at six point two five, depending on credit and down payment.

turns.cn: 能预约面谈吗？
turns.en: Can I schedule an in-person meeting?

turns.cn: 可以，周六分行有人，我帮您转预约。
turns.en: Yes. Someone's at the branch Saturday. I'll transfer you to scheduling.

turns.cn: 谢谢。
turns.en: Thank you.

title: Chain 3/8: Utility Company
scene: 你打电话报修家里没热水。（对话链：打电话）

turns.cn: 公用事业客服，请说账号或地址。
turns.en: Utility customer service. Account number or address, please.

turns.cn: 公园路 88 号，热水器不工作了。
turns.en: Eighty-eight Park Road. The water heater isn't working.

turns.cn: 完全没热水还是温度不够？
turns.en: No hot water at all or just not hot enough?

turns.cn: 完全冷的，昨天还好。
turns.en: Completely cold. It was fine yesterday.

turns.cn: 派技师明天上午八点到十二点之间上门。
turns.en: We'll send a technician tomorrow between eight and noon.

turns.cn: 好，我在家等。
turns.en: Okay. I'll be home.

title: Chain 4/8: Insurance Claim
scene: 你打电话申报车险小额理赔。（对话链：打电话）

turns.cn: 理赔部门，保单号多少？
turns.en: Claims department. What's your policy number?

turns.cn: 在这，停车场被刮了，对方跑了。
turns.en: Here it is. Someone scraped my car in a parking lot and left.

turns.cn: 有照片和警方报告吗？
turns.en: Do you have photos and a police report?

turns.cn: 有照片，警察说小额不用报告。
turns.en: I have photos. Police said no report needed for minor damage.

turns.cn: 好，我发链接上传材料，三到五天处理。
turns.en: Okay. I'll send a link to upload documents. Three to five days.

turns.cn: 谢谢。
turns.en: Thank you.

title: Chain 5/8: Wrong Number
scene: 你打错号码，对方礼貌回应。（对话链：打电话）

turns.cn: 喂？
turns.en: Hello?

turns.cn: 请问是李明吗？……抱歉打错了。
turns.en: Is this Li Ming? …Sorry, wrong number.

turns.cn: 没事，你找谁？
turns.en: No problem. Who were you looking for?

turns.cn: 我朋友，可能号差一位。
turns.en: A friend. Maybe I misdialed one digit.

turns.cn: 好，再见。
turns.en: Okay. Bye.

turns.cn: 再见，不好意思。
turns.en: Bye. Sorry about that.

title: Chain 6/8: Leave a Voicemail
scene: 对方没接，你留语音留言。（对话链：打电话）

turns.cn: 请在嘟声后留言。
turns.en: Please leave a message after the tone.

turns.cn: 妈，是我，今晚加班晚点回，别等我吃饭。
turns.en: Mom, it's me. Working late tonight. Don't wait for me for dinner.

turns.cn: 大概九点到，到了给你发短信。
turns.en: I'll be home around nine. I'll text when I arrive.

turns.cn: 拜拜。
turns.en: Bye.

title: Chain 7/8: Customer Service Hold
scene: 你打航空公司改机票，需要等待。（对话链：打电话）

turns.cn: 感谢等待，怎么帮您？
turns.en: Thanks for holding. How can I help?

turns.cn: 我想把周五的航班改到周日，同一航线。
turns.en: I'd like to move Friday's flight to Sunday, same route.

turns.cn: 查一下……周日有空位，改签费七十五。
turns.en: Let me check… Sunday has seats. Change fee is seventy-five.

turns.cn: 可以，确认改吧。
turns.en: That's fine. Please confirm the change.

turns.cn: 好了，新确认号发您邮箱。
turns.en: Done. New confirmation sent to your email.

turns.cn: 收到，谢谢。
turns.en: Got it. Thank you.

title: Chain 8/8: Confirm Reservation
scene: 你打电话确认餐厅生日宴预订。（对话链：打电话）

turns.cn: 红叶餐厅。
turns.en: Maple Leaf Restaurant.

turns.cn: 我订了周六晚六点，八位，姓张，想确认。
turns.en: I booked Saturday at six for eight, name Zhang. Just confirming.

turns.cn: 找到了，靠窗长桌，有生日布置吗？
turns.en: Yes. Window long table. Any birthday setup?

turns.cn: 要，小蛋糕和蜡烛，我付费。
turns.en: Yes. Small cake and candles. I'll pay for that.

turns.cn: 记下了，当天保留十五分钟。
turns.en: Noted. We'll hold it for fifteen minutes that day.

turns.cn: 谢谢，周六见。
turns.en: Thank you. See you Saturday.
